loan_requestment_no.text: เลขที่คำขอ

root.sql:
SELECT vr_tel_lon_hang.loan_requestment_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(vr_tel_lon_hang.membership_no) as memname ,vr_tel_lon_hang.membership_no ,substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(vr_tel_lon_hang.membership_no),1,30) as age_life_text ,substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(vr_tel_lon_hang.membership_no)),1,30) as age_mem_text ,vr_tel_lon_hang.salary_amount --เงินเดือน ,(vr_tel_lon_hang.salary_amount*12)/100 as salary_12_per --12%เงินเดือน ,vr_tel_lon_hang.total_share_value-- หุ้น ,vr_tel_lon_hang.insure_amount --เงินฝาก66 ,vr_tel_lon_hang.total_crem_balance --หนี้สามัญ(ฌ) ,vr_tel_lon_hang.retire_provident_fund --กองทุนสำรองเลี้ยงชีพ ณ ปัจจุบัน ,vr_tel_lon_hang.retire_paid_crem --หนี้สามัญ(ฌ)
--แบบไม่แขวนหนี้ ,vr_tel_lon_hang.mem_request_amount --ขอกู้ ,vr_tel_lon_hang.retire_install --จำนวนงวด ,vr_tel_lon_hang.retire_period --งวดละ ,vr_tel_lon_hang.saman_clear_target_66 -- หักหนี้สามัญเดิม ,vr_tel_lon_hang.saman_clear_target --หักหนี้สามัญทั้งหมด ,vr_tel_lon_hang.dep_amount--เงินฝาก ,vr_tel_lon_hang.realamount --รับสุทธิ ,vr_tel_lon_hang.balance_salary - (vr_tel_lon_hang.retire_period - vr_tel_lon_hang.period_payment_amount) as balance_sal_no_hang --หน้าซองคงเหลือ(ไม่แขวนหนี้สามัญ)
--แบบแขวนหนี้เงินกู้สามัญ ,vr_tel_lon_hang.mem_request_amount --ขอกู้ ,loan_installment_amount--งวด ,period_payment_amount --งวดละ ,(mem_request_amount - retire_paid) as work_amount--ส่งตามอายุงาน(จำนวนเงิน) ,(loan_installment_amount - retire_install) as install_hang-- แขวนหนี้(งวด) ,retire_paid --แขวนหนี้(จำนวนเงิน) ,vr_tel_lon_hang.balance_salary --หน้างซองคงเหลือ(แบบแขวนกู้สามัญ)
--แขวนหนี้
, (mem_request_amount + (select nvl(sum(principal_of_loan),0) from sc_lon_m_loan_history,sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = vr_tel_lon_hang.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_type and (sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = 0))) as loan_burden --ภาระเงินกู้
,(SELECT nvl(sum(sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance),0) from sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = vr_tel_lon_hang.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not like '3%' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) as coll_amount --ภาระค้ำประกัน
,(SELECT nvl(sum(sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance),0) from sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = vr_tel_lon_hang.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type like '3%' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) as coll_amount_char --ภาระค้ำประกันฌาปนกิจ
,vr_tel_lon_hang.provident_fund--กองทุนสำรองเลี้ยงชีพ ,nvl(vr_tel_lon_hang.total_special_balance,0) as total_special_balance--หนี้พิเศษแขวน
,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description ,vr_tel_lon_hang.remark ,vr_tel_lon_hang.own_send_provident_rate*100 as own_send_provident_rate
FROM vr_tel_lon_hang ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj where vr_tel_lon_hang.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code and vr_tel_lon_hang.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type --and vr_tel_lon_hang.membership_no = '11901'
/*WHERE*/

r_mwa_loan_hang_nest_loan.sql:
select sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'DD/MM/YYYY') as begining_of_contract_tdate ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount ,sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date ,'DD/MM/YYYY') as last_calcint_tdate ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_period ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance
from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_card
where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0} and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance >0
order by sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount desc

r_mwa_loan_hang_nest_coll.sql:
select sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code) ||''||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_amount ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no
from sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_mem_m_membership_registered
where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0
and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = (select membership_no from sc_lon_m_loan_request where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = {0})
order by sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no
